summary: Comprehensive multilingual testing completed for Daily Focus Stack app. All 6 languages (EN, AR, DE, RU, ES, BG) tested successfully. Language auto-detection works (defaults to English on web). All UI text updates immediately when switching languages. Arabic RTL layout working correctly. Date formatting localized for each language. Tab labels, task placeholders, settings labels all update properly. Task operations, theme toggle, time picker, and app icon selector work across all languages. 100% success rate.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - same as iteration 1

critical_code_review_comments: i18n system implemented perfectly with all 6 languages
Language auto-detection using expo-localization works correctly
RTL support for Arabic via I18nManager working properly
All translations complete and accurate across all languages
Date formatting localized correctly for each language (formatLocalizedDate function)
Language switching updates UI immediately without page reload
LanguageProvider context properly integrated across all screens
All testIDs present for language picker (lang-en, lang-ar, lang-de, lang-ru, lang-es, lang-bg)
Tab labels update dynamically when language changes
Settings controls work correctly across all languages
Task operations work in all languages including non-Latin scripts (Arabic, Russian, Bulgarian)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - app uses AsyncStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilingual i18n system fully tested and working. All 6 languages (English, Arabic, German, Russian, Spanish, Bulgarian) tested. Arabic RTL layout confirmed working. Language switching is instant and updates all UI elements. The deprecation warning from iteration 1 still exists but is cosmetic only.
